_readme: Controlled status for programs whose public description must match reality. Allowed status values: concept, seeking-pilot-partner, pilot-scheduled, pilot-active, pilot-completed, paused. Update the record here (not the page copy) and rebuild; the page renders the matching status flag automatically. When a pilot is scheduled or active, fill in the optional pilot fields — only include a partner name with written permission.

accessCorps.note: This program is not yet operating. We're describing the model and looking for a first pilot partner. Nothing on this page describes an active service or an existing school endorsement.
